nasb.text: and calling out, they were asking whether Simon, who was also called Peter, was staying there.

esv.text: and called out to ask whether Simon who was called Peter was lodging there.

cnv.text: 大聲問：“有沒有一個名叫彼得的西門在這裡作客？”

ccb.text: 正站在门口大声问西门·彼得是否住在这里。

csbs.text: 大声问：“是否有一位称为彼得的西门在这里作客住宿？”
